notes: Vanilla DOM views. mountInGameView subscribes via readGame and routes between my-turn / waiting / reveal based on computePhase. Submission is gated on action + confidence; note is optional. Notification-enable button surfaces in the game header and respects platform/permission state. After successful submit, sendTurnNotification fires best-effort. mountWrapUpView renders the three required wrap-up sections: per-player accuracy, inter-player agreement, ranked disagreements (joint-confidence-min descending).
